name: @khemsok/scrbd
description: YouTube transcript extractor with AI-powered summaries, quizzes, and chat. Available as a CLI and Chrome extension.
author: khemsok

scripts.build:ext: bun build extension/src/content/content.ts --outfile extension/dist/content.js --target browser && bun build extension/src/background/service-worker.ts --outfile extension/dist/service-worker.js --target browser && bun build extension/src/content/inject.ts --outfile extension/dist/inject.js --target browser
